CORRECTS TIME ON PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT FROM 4 S PORTAGE. NWS STORM SURVEY HAS CONFIRMED AN EF-1 TORNADO SOUTH OF PORTAGE. THIS TORNADO PRODUCED AN AREA OF DAMAGE TO TREES, MOBILE HOMES, AND OUTBUILDING STRUCTURES BETWEEN I-39 AND THE WISCONSIN RIVER. PEAK WINDS ARE ESTIMATED TO BE AROUND 105 MPH.

NWS STORM SURVEY HAS CONFIRMED AN EF-1 TORNADO IN THE TOWN OF MIDDLETON. THIS TORNADO PRODUCED AN AREA OF DAMAGE BEGINNING AROUND OLD SAUK RD AND ENDING AROUND HICKORY HILL RD. PATH LENGTH IS ESTIMATED TO BE 2.27 MILES LONG WITH PEAK WIND SPEED AROUND 93 MPH.
